dialogues.text: I'm collecting donations for the free clinic downtown. Can you spare $5?
dialogues.yes_response: Every dollar saves lives. Thank you.
dialogues.no_response: I understand. It's a hard time for everyone.

dialogues.text: I need someone to help me carry medical supplies to the shelter two blocks over. $10 for your time.
dialogues.no_response: No worries. I'll make two trips.

dialogues.text: My parking meter ran out. Could I borrow $2?
dialogues.no_response: I'll take my chances with the ticket.

dialogues.text: I need a volunteer to hand out health pamphlets at the corner. $7 for an hour.
dialogues.no_response: That's alright. Health can wait apparently.

dialogues.text: Medication fund is running low. Even $8 helps us serve patients.
dialogues.yes_response: This will help someone tonight. Thank you.
dialogues.no_response: We'll find another way. We always do.

dialogues.text: Could you sit with an elderly patient at the clinic while I run errands? I'll give you $12.
dialogues.yes_response: She'd appreciate the company. Room three.

dialogues.text: Research fund for preventable diseases. Just $3 would mean so much.
dialogues.yes_response: Small donations change the world. Thank you.

dialogues.text: I need someone to pick up a prescription from the pharmacy on Main. $9 for the errand.
dialogues.yes_response: Here's the slip. Ask for Dr. Park's order.

dialogues.text: Could you donate $6 to the children's vaccination drive?
dialogues.yes_response: On behalf of every child you'll never meet — thank you.
dialogues.no_response: Not everyone can give. I appreciate you listening.

dialogues.text: Help me set up chairs for the community health talk tonight. $8 and free coffee.
dialogues.yes_response: Wonderful. The hall is just around the corner.
dialogues.no_response: I'll manage. The coffee was good though.
